title: Admin UI for player deactivation and reactivation
description: Add admin interface controls for deactivating and reactivating players. The deactivate action should show a confirmation dialog listing what will be affected (upcoming fixtures, captain roles, availability data). If the player is a Team Captain, show a blocking warning requiring captain reassignment first. Add a 'Show inactive players' toggle to the player list, and a reactivate button on inactive player rows.
acceptance_criteria: Deactivate button visible on active player rows in admin player list
Clicking deactivate shows confirmation dialog listing affected data
Confirmation dialog shows: number of upcoming fixtures, captain status, availability records to be deleted
If player is Team Captain, dialog shows blocking warning with link to reassign
Successful deactivation shows success message and player disappears from default list
Show inactive toggle on player list reveals deactivated players with visual distinction
Inactive players show a Reactivate button
Reactivate sets player back to active (admin must manually re-add to teams)
Reactivation shows message reminding admin to add player to teams
All actions use HTMX for seamless page updates
Mobile-responsive layout for all new controls

approach: 1. Add deactivate-confirm GET endpoint that returns impact summary (fixture count, captain status, etc.)
2. Render confirmation dialog via HTMX (hx-get to load, hx-swap for modal)
3. POST deactivate endpoint calls DeactivatePlayer service method
4. POST reactivate endpoint calls ReactivatePlayer service method
5. Add ?show_inactive=true query param support to player list handler
6. Style inactive players with muted/greyed-out appearance
7. Add toggle button/checkbox for show_inactive filter

testing_requirements: E2E: Admin can deactivate a player via the UI
E2E: Confirmation dialog shows correct impact information
E2E: Deactivated player disappears from default player list
E2E: Show inactive toggle reveals deactivated players
E2E: Admin can reactivate a player via the UI
E2E: Reactivated player reappears in default player list
E2E: Cannot deactivate a player who is an active Team Captain (UI shows warning)
E2E: Deactivation works on mobile viewport
E2E: HTMX updates work without full page reload

context.user_story: As an admin, I want a clear and safe way to remove a player from the club through the web interface, with confirmation of what will be affected before I proceed
